summary: Government Registers v89.3.0 - 3 New Features fully tested. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Transit Pass (view-only), CMR Delivery Tracker (CRUD with OTR), and Security Deposit Management (CRUD) working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Government Registers v89.3.0 tested. Now has 10 sub-tabs: Paddy Custody, Transit Pass, CMR Delivery, Form A, Form B, Form E, Form F, FRK Blending, Gunny Bags, Security Deposit. Transit Pass is VIEW-ONLY (auto-generated from mill_entries where tp_no exists). CMR Delivery and Security Deposit have full CRUD. OTR (Outturn Ratio) = (total CMR delivered / total paddy received) * 100.
